sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41319" key="e)pitetramerh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτετρᾰ-μερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n41319.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing one plus four-fifths,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
